languages.text: Архимилитанту Ведке Дунавски долгое время удавалось стратегически распределять исчезающе малые военные силы протектората, но низкая дисциплина новобранцев вынуждала ее постоянно присутствовать на поле боя лично. Во время одной из таких операций Ведка погибла из-за неправильно настроенного орудия собственного полка.

For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.
languages.original_text: Архимилитанту Ведке Дунавски долгое время удавалось стратегически распределять исчезающе малые военные силы протектората, но низкая дисциплина новобранцев вынуждала ее постоянно присутствовать на поле боя лично. Во время одной из таких операций Ведка погибла из-за неправильно настроенного орудия собственного полка.

traits.locale_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、長年、プロテクト国の微々たる軍勢を戦略的に配備し続けた。しかし、彼女の兵士たちの規律の欠如により、彼女は常に戦場を離れられなかった。ある作戦中に、ヴェドカは自軍の銃の誤射により死亡した。
languages.original_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、長年、プロテクト国の微々たる軍勢を戦略的に配備し続けた。しかし、彼女の兵士たちの規律の欠如により、彼女は常に戦場を離れられなかった。ある作戦中に、ヴェドカは自軍の銃の誤射により死亡した。

languages.text: 起初很长一段时间里，首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡尚能勉强维持着对属地那点稀薄兵力的战略部署，但新兵糟糕的军纪迫使她不得不频繁亲临战场。最终，在一次这样的行动中，薇德卡被己方军团打偏的枪炮误杀。
languages.original_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

traits.locale_text: 起初很长一段时间里，首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡尚能勉强维持着对属地那点稀薄兵力的战略部署，但新兵糟糕的军纪迫使她不得不频繁亲临战场。最终，在一次这样的行动中，薇德卡被己方军团打偏的枪炮误杀。

languages.text: Pendant longtemps, l'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski réussit à tirer parti des maigres troupes du protectorat en les postant stratégiquement, mais le manque de discipline de ses recrues nécessitait sa présence constante sur le champ de bataille. Au cours de l'une de ces opérations, elle fut tuée par l'arme mal alignée d'un soldat de son propre régiment.
languages.original_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

traits.locale_text: Pendant longtemps, l'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski réussit à tirer parti des maigres troupes du protectorat en les postant stratégiquement, mais le manque de discipline de ses recrues nécessitait sa présence constante sur le champ de bataille. Au cours de l'une de ces opérations, elle fut tuée par l'arme mal alignée d'un soldat de son propre régiment.

languages.text: Durante mucho tiempo, la Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski consiguió distribuir estratégicamente las diminutas fuerzas militares del protectorado, pero la pobre disciplina de sus reclutas requería su presencia constante en el campo de batalla. Durante una de esas operaciones, Vedka murió víctima de uno de los disparos desviados de su propia artillería.
languages.original_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

traits.locale_text: Durante mucho tiempo, la Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski consiguió distribuir estratégicamente las diminutas fuerzas militares del protectorado, pero la pobre disciplina de sus reclutas requería su presencia constante en el campo de batalla. Durante una de esas operaciones, Vedka murió víctima de uno de los disparos desviados de su propia artillería.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, protektoranın giderek azalan askerî güçlerini uzun bir süre stratejik olarak dağıtmayı başarsa da acemilerinin zayıf disiplini onu savaş alanında sürekli bulunmaya zorladı. Böyle bir operasyon sırasında Vedka, kendi alayının kötü nişanlanmış bir atışı yüzünden öldürüldü.
languages.original_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, protektoranın giderek azalan askerî güçlerini uzun bir süre stratejik olarak dağıtmayı başarsa da acemilerinin zayıf disiplini onu savaş alanında sürekli bulunmaya zorladı. Böyle bir operasyon sırasında Vedka, kendi alayının kötü nişanlanmış bir atışı yüzünden öldürüldü.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski gelange es lange Zeit, die verschwindend kleine Armee des Protektorats strategisch zu verteilen, aber die fehlende Disziplin ihrer Rekruten erforderte ihre ständige Anwesenheit auf dem Schlachtfeld. Während einer solchen Operation wurde Vedka versehentlich von einem ihrer eigenen Männer erschossen.
languages.original_text: For a long time, Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski managed to strategically distribute the protectorate's vanishingly small military forces, but the poor discipline of her recruits compelled her constant presence on the battlefield. During one such operation, Vedka was killed by her own regiment's misaligned gun.
